title: Verify T24 test implementation
description: Test Case T24 'Decompose simple task' is a pipeline test verifying Kody handles simple single-file tasks with minimal planning overhead. The test creates a temp issue requesting a simple utility function, triggers Kody, verifies quick completion with minimal back-and-forth, then cleans up. Pipeline is currently running (taskify stage). This taskify classification confirms the test specification is properly loaded and the pipeline execution is in progress.
